findings.ruleDescription: Detects patterns where external input is interpolated into shell commands. Enables arbitrary command execution if input is not sanitized.
findings.recommendation: This code passes unsanitized input to shell commands. An attacker could inject additional commands (e.g., "; rm -rf /") to execute arbitrary operations. Use parameterized commands or input validation.

matches.description: exec/spawn with template literal containing variables

fullDescription.text: Detects patterns where external input is interpolated into shell commands. Enables arbitrary command execution if input is not sanitized.

matchDetails.description: exec/spawn with template literal containing variables

properties.recommendation: This code passes unsanitized input to shell commands. An attacker could inject additional commands (e.g., "; rm -rf /") to execute arbitrary operations. Use parameterized commands or input validation.

findings.ruleDescription: Detects patterns that read environment variables (API keys, tokens, secrets) and transmit them externally. Common in supply chain attacks for credential theft.
findings.recommendation: This code reads environment variables and appears to transmit them externally. This is a critical credential theft pattern. Do not install.

matches.description: Accessing entire process.env object (not a single var)

fullDescription.text: Detects patterns that read environment variables (API keys, tokens, secrets) and transmit them externally. Common in supply chain attacks for credential theft.

matchDetails.description: Accessing entire process.env object (not a single var)

properties.recommendation: This code reads environment variables and appears to transmit them externally. This is a critical credential theft pattern. Do not install.

findings.ruleTitle: File size anomaly for file type
findings.ruleDescription: Flags files whose size significantly exceeds the expected range for their file type. A tailwind.config.js at 7KB when typical is 1-2KB, or a SKILL.md at 50KB when typical is 2-5KB, suggests hidden content.
findings.reportTitle: File size or structure anomaly detected
findings.recommendation: Inspect the file for hidden content, especially at the end of long lines or after the apparent end of meaningful code.

matches.description: Config file more than 8x expected size for its type
